title: Golden Norwegian Porridge
description: A comforting and healthy Norwegian-inspired breakfast dish made with porridge oats, norwegian sesame seeds and a touch of golden honey.
instructions: In a large saucepan, combine porridge oats and gluten-free milk.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to a simmer.
Add golden honey and norwegian sesame seeds. Stir until combined.
Cook for 10-15 minutes or until oats have absorbed most of the milk.
Season with a pinch of salt.
